NAVAREA XIX 59/20

NORWEGIANSEA

SEISMIC SURVAY IN POGRESS BY MV SW AMUNDSEN. TOWING 8 X 4400 MTRS LONG SEISMIC CABELS
TIME PERIOD 20JUN-15AUG 2020

AREA BOUNDED BY:
A. 66-28.6N 008-56.5E
B. 66-28.6N 007-21.0E
C. 65-45.3N 007-21.0E 
D. 65-45.3N 008-56.5E

WIDE BERTH REQUESTED: 
3NM AHEAD AND ON THE SIDES AND 5NM ASTERN

GUARD AND SUPPORT VESSELS MV MAINPORT PINE AND MV ASTRA-G

WARNING VALID UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE
